channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Eight Practical Strategies for Meeting Your Daily Protein Requirements
Study Links Launch of 988 Suicide Hotline to Decline in Youth Suicide Rates
item.description: Suicide rates among teenagers and young adults declined in the two years following the launch of the 988 Suicide and Crisis Lifeline.

item.title: What Adequate Daily Hydration Does to the Human Body
Meghan Trainor on Resilience, Wellness, and Developing Healthier Habits
item.description: Meghan Trainor discusses filtering out public criticism, focusing on her physical health, and building consistent routines that support her well-being.

item.title: Study Finds a Specific Dietary Addition Can Reduce Blood Pressure
item.description: Research suggests that adding one particular food to the diet can lower blood pressure and also support digestive health.
